projectDescription: SteadyPay is a billing enforcement layer for Stripe-powered SaaS products that intercepts failed payments at the moment subscribers are inside your app, requiring a card update before they can continue.
keyFeatures: Non-bypassable billing gate — full-screen overlay prevents app access until card is updated
JS enforcement snippet — add one <script> tag to any web app
React Native SDK with SteadpayGate component and useSteadpay hook
Swift SDK for SwiftUI apps (iOS 15+ / macOS 13+)
Android SDK using Jetpack Compose (min API 26)
Three enforcement states: active, warning (dismissable banner), lockout (full-screen gate)
Automatic Stripe webhook integration for payment failure and recovery events
Smart retry schedule: Day 1, Day 3, Day 7 before lockout
Downstream webhooks with HMAC-SHA256 signature verification (Scale tier)
Fail-open design — unknown subscribers are treated as active
Customizable enforcement UI — bring your own lockout screen and warning banner
Interactive sandbox for testing without a real account
